query: SELECT id, name, images, LENGTH(images) as img_len FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 210001 AND name IN ('PRESTIGIO', 'MENTOS MORANGO', 'Cachorro quente aberto', 'Suco de laranja🍊🍊 450 ML', 'Omeletes', 'Alho e Óleo') ORDER BY id;
